# Handle Types
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.PostgreSQL/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzurePostgresFlexibleServerDatabaseResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.PostgreSQL/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzurePostgresFlexibleServerResource

# Capabilities
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.PostgreSQL/addAzurePostgresFlexibleServer(name: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.PostgreSQL/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzurePostgresFlexibleServerResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.PostgreSQL/addDatabase(name: string, databaseName?: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.PostgreSQL/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzurePostgresFlexibleServerDatabaseResource
